critiqued.title: GEV Tail Index (xi) as Phylogenomic Signature of Thermal Adaptation Strategy
critiqued.key_attack: Effect size unknown; only 1-2 thermophiles in 13-species dataset may under-power xi-OGT regression

critiqued.title: Complex-Minimum Tm via POT Identifies Thermal Bottleneck Complexes
critiqued.key_attack: Citation conflation (Mateus 2020 MSB cited as Science 367:eaaz5268; correct: Tan 2018 Science 359:1170). In-complex stabilization makes lysate Tm_min a poor proxy for functional failure.
critiqued.citation_issues: Mateus et al. 2020, Science 367:eaaz5268 is FABRICATED — finding from Tan et al. 2018, Science 359:1170-1177

critiqued.title: Censored GEV Recovers the Invisible 20% Below TPP Measurement Window
critiqued.key_attack: Multi-modal tail (IDPs vs. marginally stable proteins) would defeat unimodal GEV extrapolation. Cold denaturation creates non-random censoring. +/-3% accuracy claim is speculative.

critiqued.title: Non-Stationary GEV with Drug Concentration as Covariate
critiqued.key_attack: Three independent kill signals: (1) 3-5 drug concentrations grossly insufficient for non-stationary GEV trend detection, (2) cascade mechanism unsupported and dominant drug effect (target stabilization) is opposite to predicted destabilization, (3) >50% claims speculative or contradicted.

critiqued.title: Pathway-Level Block Maxima: Translation Initiation as Universal Thermal Death Bottleneck
critiqued.key_attack: Biological prediction partially pre-empted by Bresson 2024 Molecular Cell (eIF4F is a thermo-sensing node). eIF4A is heat-resistant (contradicts low-Tm assumption). Single-bottleneck framework conflicts with multi-factorial thermal death models.

critiqued.title: Extremal Index Quantifies Thermal Cooperativity
critiqued.key_attack: Extremal index theta is defined for sequential/temporal data. Cross-sectional Tm data sorted by value creates tautological clustering. Spatial extensions require pre-defined spatial structure that Tm data lacks. Same citation conflation as H2.
critiqued.citation_issues: Mateus et al. 2020, Science 367:eaaz5268 is FABRICATED — finding from Tan et al. 2018, Science 359:1170-1177

critiqued.title: POT Functional Enrichment: Thermal Disposability Design Principle
critiqued.key_attack: Kinase low-Tm claim is unverified and potentially self-contradicted (CDK2 ~55C > proteome median). Protein size confound (large proteins have lower Tm; kinases are large) could explain any enrichment without invoking 'thermal disposability'.

critic_questions.question: Citation 'Mateus et al. 2020, Science 367:eaaz5268' does not exist. The TPCA >350 complexes finding is from Tan et al. 2018, Science 359:1170-1177. Please correct.
What are the specific Tm values for eIF4E, eIF4A, eIF2alpha, and eIF4G in the Meltome Atlas? Bresson et al. 2024 (Molecular Cell) shows eIF4A is heat-resistant. Can you look up actual Tm values?

The hypothesis claims kinases have low Tm but CDK2 Tm ~55C would be above the proteome median. What is the actual distribution of kinase Tm values in the Meltome Atlas? Does GO:0004672 enrich in the lower or upper tail?
Is there evidence that the sub-30C proteome contains distinct subpopulations (IDPs vs. marginally stable folded proteins)? This determines whether censored GEV (unimodal assumption) is appropriate.
Is there any prior data on the SHAPE of Tm distributions (not just mean/SD) across species? Even qualitative descriptions (unimodal vs. bimodal, skewness) would help calibrate xi effect size.

quality_gate.title: GEV Tail Index (xi) as Phylogenomic Signature of Thermal Adaptation Strategy
quality_gate.key_strength: Genuinely novel connection, theorem-backed mathematics, all citations verified, testable with existing data
quality_gate.key_weakness: n=13 species with phylogenetic confounding; bimodal distributions (E. coli) may complicate GEV fitting

quality_gate.title: Complex-Minimum Tm Return Levels Predict Process-Specific Thermal Failure Temperatures
quality_gate.key_strength: Best mechanistic specification; novel application of return levels to process failure prediction
quality_gate.key_weakness: TPCA attribution error (Mateus 2020 -> Tan 2018); chaperone buffering may invalidate +-2C window
quality_gate.conditions: Correct TPCA attribution to Tan 2018; quantify chaperone buffering correction
quality_gate.citation_errors: soft attribution error (TPCA finding attributed to review instead of primary source)

quality_gate.title: Censored GEV Recovers the Invisible 20% Below TPP Measurement Window
quality_gate.key_strength: Genuinely novel methodological transfer; addresses real problem (20% unmeasured)
quality_gate.key_weakness: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: censored GEV assumes all censored proteins have defined Tm, but IDPs lack cooperative unfolding transition
quality_gate.fail_reason: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: Core censoring assumption violated -- IDPs in the censored population have no defined Tm, making the censored likelihood misspecified

quality_gate.title: GPD Scale Parameter Predicts Evolutionary Rate in the Thermally Vulnerable Subproteome
quality_gate.key_strength: Novel sigma-dN/dS prediction connecting thermal vulnerability to evolutionary constraint
quality_gate.key_weakness: Drummond citation error (PNAS not Cell); enrichment component has prior art (Leuenberger 2017); dN/dS confounders may swamp signal
quality_gate.conditions: Correct Drummond citation; distinguish novel component (sigma-dN/dS) from prior art (GO enrichment); control for expression-level confounders
quality_gate.citation_errors: journal attribution error (Drummond 2005 cited as Cell, actual journal is PNAS)

target_evaluation.recommended_primary_title: Extreme Value Theory x Proteome Thermal Vulnerability Mapping
target_evaluation.recommended_primary_rationale: Highest composite (8.25), maximum frontier expansion (10/10 local-optima), highest disjointness confidence (0.97), immediately testable on existing data, converging_vocabularies has strong track record (S014: 87.5% PASS+COND)
target_evaluation.strongest_alternative_title: Classical Nucleation Theory x Ferroptosis Ferritin Iron Pool Dynamics
target_evaluation.strongest_alternative_rationale: Highest mechanistic specificity (9/10), highest impact (8/10), compelling anomaly (LIP non-expansion), but ferroptosis field recurrence (3rd session) is a concern

checks_detail.pubmed_cooccurrence: DISJOINT — 0 papers on EVT x Tm-distributions bridge; 7 EVT+proteomics papers all in MS scoring domain
checks_detail.kegg_pathway: CONNECTED — hsa04141 confirmed; STRING HSP90/HSP70 scores 0.939-0.999
checks_detail.dataset_existence: VERIFIED — Meltome Atlas PXD011929: 13,000 human proteins, 77 datasets, publicly downloadable
checks_detail.pot_tail_exceedances: PLAUSIBLE — 700-1300 at 90th pct; 70-130 at 99th pct >> 50 minimum
checks_detail.gev_shape_reliability: PLAUSIBLE — SE(xi)=0.029-0.035 at n=5000-7000; distinguishes Weibull/Gumbel/Frechet
checks_detail.return_level_mapping: PLAUSIBLE — 23% proteome below 42C; paper confirms 10% precipitation at 44C
checks_detail.weibull_domain: PLAUSIBLE — Tm bounded 30-90C empirically; no eukaryote proteins >90C
checks_detail.independence_assumption: MARGINAL — complex co-melting r=0.75-0.83; standard corrections available (cluster-maxima, extremal index)
checks_detail.string_scores: VERIFIED — all HSP90/HSP70 pairs >0.93; highest confidence

key_concerns: Independence violation: protein complex co-aggregation confirmed (350+ human complexes, r=0.75-0.83 within complexes). Use cluster-maxima (min Tm per complex) to restore approximate independence. Generator should explicitly frame EVT at complex level.

Left-censoring: Meltome Atlas Tm<30C proteins unobservable (most thermally vulnerable tail). Use censored GEV likelihood or confine POT to observable 30-45C range. Should be stated as methodological contribution.
Nonmelters (~15-25% body fluids, minimal in cell lines): affects upper-tail analysis only; lower-tail / vulnerability analysis unaffected.
computational_readiness.blast_gumbel_distinction: BLAST/Karlin-Altschul applies EVT to alignment score maxima; not related to Tm distribution analysis; not a novelty threat
computational_readiness.recommendation: Proceed to generation with HIGH confidence. Generator should apply EVT to complex-minimum Tm (thermal bottleneck), focus on lower tail / thermally vulnerable subset (POT), specify Weibull domain (xi<0) as testable prediction, and use 13-species Meltome Atlas for tail index vs. OGT correlation as primary validation.

dataset_evidence.key_finding: All molecular biology substrates confirmed. CDK2 structural evidence (pLDDT=88.44, 498 PDB structures, STRING 0.999 with CCNA2/p27) independently validates QG mandatory correction to H7. HSPA8 chaperone function confirms complex formation/dissociation mechanism underlying H2 chaperone-buffering caveat.
